requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220–240 V / 50 Hz, Type A / Type G Plug (Yemen)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — 220–240V/50Hz，A型/G型插头（也门）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — 220–240V/50Hz，A型/G型插頭（葉門）

summary.en: Yemen operates on a 220–240 V / 50 Hz electrical supply standard. Both Type A (US-style 2-flat-pin, ungrounded) and Type G (British 3-pin) plug types are in common use due to Yemen's historical exposure to both American and British electrical influences. Type A sockets are prevalent across many households and older installations; Type G sockets are found in some commercial premises and newer installations. Wireless devices with integrated power supplies (adapters, chargers, powered IoT hubs) must be rated for the 220–240 V / 50 Hz supply range. Electrical safety testing to IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 (the successor standard for audio/video, IT, and communication equipment) is expected for devices connecting to the mains supply. Chinese GB 4943.1 safety certification is not independently recognised by Yemeni authorities. YSMO references IEC standards for electrical safety where applicable, but YSMO's operational capacity is significantly impacted by the ongoing conflict.
summary.zh: 也门采用220–240V/50Hz供电标准。由于受到美国和英国电气影响的历史，A型（美式双扁针，不接地）和G型（英式三针）两种插头均普遍使用。A型插座在许多住宅和旧式装置中普遍存在；G型插座见于部分商业场所和新式装置。集成电源的无线设备（适配器、充电器、有源物联网集线器）须适用于220–240V/50Hz供电范围。连接市电的设备应按IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1（视听、IT和通信设备的后续标准）进行电气安全测试。中国GB 4943.1安全认证不被也门当局单独承认。YSMO在适用情况下参考IEC电气安全标准，但YSMO运营能力因持续冲突受到严重影响。
summary.zht: 葉門採用220–240V/50Hz供電標準。由於受到美國和英國電氣影響的歷史，A型（美式雙扁針，不接地）和G型（英式三針）兩種插頭均普遍使用。A型插座在許多住宅和舊式裝置中普遍存在；G型插座見於部分商業場所和新式裝置。集成電源的無線設備（適配器、充電器、有源物聯網集線器）須適用於220–240V/50Hz供電範圍。連接市電的設備應按IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1（視聽、IT和通訊設備的後續標準）進行電氣安全測試。中國GB 4943.1安全認證不被葉門當局單獨承認。YSMO在適用情況下參考IEC電氣安全標準，但YSMO運營能力因持續衝突受到嚴重影響。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2023 (Audio/video, IT and communication equipment — Safety requirements, recommended successor to IEC 60950-1)
IEC 60950-1:2005+A1+A2 (IT equipment safety, still referenced for legacy products)
YSMO IEC-aligned electrical safety standards references
Yemen electrical supply standard: 220–240 V / 50 Hz
Plug types: Type A (NEMA 1-15) and Type G (BS 1363) — both prevalent in Yemen

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for IT and communication equipment is governed by CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 (which adopts IEC 60950-1 with national deviations) or the newer GB 4943.23 (based on IEC 62368-1). China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz, with Type A and Type I plug standards (GB 2099 / GB 1002). CCC is mandatory for in-scope products but is not recognised by Yemen.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT和通信设备的电气安全由CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1（采用含国家差异的IEC 60950-1）或较新的GB 4943.23（基于IEC 62368-1）管理。中国采用220V/50Hz，插头标准为A型和I型（GB 2099/GB 1002）。CCC对列入目录的产品为强制要求，但不被也门承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT和通訊設備的電氣安全由CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1（採用含國家差異的IEC 60950-1）或較新的GB 4943.23（基於IEC 62368-1）管理。中國採用220V/50Hz，插頭標準為A型和I型（GB 2099/GB 1002）。CCC對列入目錄的產品為強制要求，但不被葉門承認。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (IT equipment electrical safety, IEC 60950-1 based with Chinese national deviations)
GB 4943.23-2023 (Audio/video, IT and communication equipment safety, IEC 62368-1 based)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification — mandatory for in-scope products)
China plug standard: Type A (NEMA) and Type I (AS/NZS) — GB 2099 / GB 1002

gap.en: Yemen mains voltage is 220–240 V / 50 Hz, which matches the Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz standard, so voltage/frequency adaptation is generally not required for the power supply unit. However, the plug situation requires attention: both Type A and Type G are common in Yemen, while China uses Type A and Type I. Devices shipped with Chinese Type I plugs will require plug adapters for Type G sockets. Universal auto-sensing switching power supplies (100–240 V) cover the voltage range. GB 4943.1 / CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by Yemen — IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory are needed as part of the Yemen import and MTIT/TPSA application dossier. YSMO's reduced capacity limits independent national standard enforcement.
gap.zh: 也门市电电压为220–240V/50Hz，与中国的220V/50Hz标准基本一致，因此电源部分通常无需电压/频率适配。但插头情况需要注意：也门A型和G型插头均普遍使用，而中国使用A型和I型。配备中国I型插头的设备在G型插座时须使用转接头。通用自适应开关电源（100–240V）可覆盖电压范围。GB 4943.1/CCC电气安全认证不被也门承认——须提供来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1测试报告，作为也门进口及MTIT/TPSA申请文件的一部分。YSMO能力下降限制了独立的国家标准执法。
gap.zht: 葉門市電電壓為220–240V/50Hz，與中國的220V/50Hz標準基本一致，因此電源部分通常無需電壓/頻率適配。但插頭情況需要注意：葉門A型和G型插頭均普遍使用，而中國使用A型和I型。配備中國I型插頭的設備在G型插座時須使用轉接頭。通用自適應開關電源（100–240V）可覆蓋電壓範圍。GB 4943.1/CCC電氣安全認證不被葉門承認——須提供來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1測試報告，作為葉門進口及MTIT/TPSA申請文件的一部分。YSMO能力下降限制了獨立的國家標準執法。

source.publisher: MTIT — Ministry of Telecommunications and Information Technology, Republic of Yemen; YSMO — Yemeni Standards, Metrology and Quality Control Organization; IEC (international standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Yemen electrical standard is 220–240 V / 50 Hz; both Type A and Type G plugs are prevalent. IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 electrical safety test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory are required; Chinese GB 4943.1 / CCC is not recognised. Verify plug compatibility and include IEC safety evidence in the MTIT/TPSA import dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 也门电气标准为220–240V/50Hz；A型和G型插头均普遍使用。须提供来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1电气安全测试报告；中国GB 4943.1/CCC不被承认。须核验插头兼容性，并在MTIT/TPSA进口文件中包含IEC安全证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 葉門電氣標準為220–240V/50Hz；A型和G型插頭均普遍使用。須提供來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1電氣安全測試報告；中國GB 4943.1/CCC不被承認。須核驗插頭相容性，並在MTIT/TPSA進口文件中包含IEC安全證據。
